Title: 8TH: THE HOUSE OF TRANSFORMATION
Description:
Some pieces aren’t just worn—they’re felt. *8TH: The House of Transformation* is built for those who embrace change, power, and reinvention. Designed with bold textures and intricate details, this denim is more than fabric—it’s a statement of evolution.   
 Fabric & Feel : - 100% Cotton Denim – Heavyweight, structured, and built to last   - Softens over time, evolving with every wear—just like you   
   Design & Texture : - Screen & Puff Printing – A rich, textured effect that brings depth to the design   - Distinctive Wash & Finish – Crafted to make each piece unique   - Custom Hardware & Signature Detailing – Elevated elements for a bold look   
 Why 8TH? The 8th house in astrology represents transformation, power, and rebirth. This isn’t just denim—it’s a symbol of change, of stepping into your power and owning it.

Title: Fear No one Denim Track Pant
Description: This pant has a relaxed, wide-leg fit  with an elastic waistband for comfort and flexibility . Bold red screen prints of expressive faces run along the leg, paired with the words Fear pushes you toward paths you’d never dare to follow. The slightly raw, imperfect print and washed finish give it a worn-in, street-ready look. Heavy, durable, and built to stand out.

Title: Gold Rush Jersey (Red stripe)
Description: Classic football jersey energy, rebuilt with Concept Groove’s signature style. Two colourways — one with a bold red stripe, the other with a deep blue stripe — cut through the black base, while golden Concept Groove branding makes the front pop. A small High Tribe emblem sits between chest and shoulder, hinting at its roots. Across the back, Top Dawg stretches wide above an oversized 07, bringing attitude and presence to every angle. Designed for those who play life like it’s always match day.

Title: Lost Youth Jorts
Description: A pocket with a flap sits on one leg,  printed with the words Lost Youth. The other side carries a large spider web  — symbolising the youth’s soul trapped in four walls built by their own society. The wash elements give the fabric a touch of rawness, making the print feel imperfect in the same way life is.  Crafted from sturdy cotton denim , these jorts combine meaning, function, and comfort, finished with screen printing designed to age naturally over time.

Title: MERAKI MODE ALL-WEATHER T-SHIRT
Description:
Unmask. Break free. Be real. This oversized all-weather full-sleeve tee is a bold ode to self-expression. The front screams DITCH THE LAYERS with trippy visuals of fake faces tearing apart — revealing the real you. Down below, a textured patch narrates the soul of MERAKI — doing everything with soul and zero fucks about opinions. 
 Turn around, and the back tells a story — 3D-depth trees stand tall with the quote: “The secret of life is to waste time in ways that you like.” A reminder to live wild, free, and proud. 
 Cut from utlra-smooth, luxe all-weather fabric, it feels premium yet effortless — perfect for any season, any scene. 
 Style tip: Rock it with baggy cargos, sneakers, and a chain for that chill, offbeat streetwear edge. 
 Ditch the world, not your vibe.

Title: Neo Tribe Denim
Description:
Neo Tribe Denim 
 For the ones who don’t blend in. 
 A clash of cultures and codes — ancient tribal energy meets the streets of now. Crafted in heavyweight denim, reinforced with rough-cut overlays and raw patternwork, this piece isn’t just worn — it’s lived in. For the ones who carve their own path. Who stand alone, but never feel lost. This is your badge of pride. This is Neo-Tribe. 
 This isn’t your regular clean-cut denim.   It’s made with  heavyweight 14oz  cotton, screen printed with a raw finish that’s meant to look worn, not polished. The overlays are rough on purpose. The wash is meant to feel lived-in. Nothing here is perfect — because it’s not made for perfect. 
 “This pant isn’t perfect. Because it’s not made for perfect.”

Title: No Quit Varsity
Description:
No Quit Varsity Jacket :  For the Real Champions who never back down.  🐅🔥 
 A jacket we all have been waiting for—a jacket dedicated to the  I won’t quit  attitude of the young and free generation! Featuring a big, bold puff print of a tiger on the back, symbolizing strength, courage, and that go-getter spirit. It’s a reminder to live your life to the fullest—take risks, chase adventures, and never play it safe. 
 Why You’ll Love It: 
 
 
 Top-Tier Quality:  Made with  high-GSM  fabric for ultimate comfort and durability. 
 
 
 Print That Lasts:  Graphics are non-fading and built to stand the test of time. 
 
 
 No Bleed, Just Bold:   Vibrant red fabric stays fresh and clean, wash after wash. 
 
 
 Style Tip :  Pair it with ripped jeans, high-top sneakers, and a crossbody bag for that effortless Gen Z street look. Or go all-out with cargos and oversized shades to flex the full varsity drip. 
 Limited Edition:  This jacket is a one-time drop. Don’t snooze—grab yours now and rep the  never-back-out  energy wherever you go 💥

Title: Octopus Jorts
Description: One leg features an octopus  in detailed screen and puff print, its arms stretching in every direction. The other side has a pocket with writing that reads  Reaching out to everything,  holding onto nothing. Made from sturdy cotton denim, the design captures the feeling of searching wide yet staying unbound. Finished with precise printing and a washed texture that adds depth and character to the piece.

Title: Rebel Club Jersey
Description: Cut from thick premium cotton, this long-sleeve quarter-zip channels the adrenaline of old-school racing culture. The front is packed with motorsport energy — Rebel Riders Club, 2025, and sponsor-style graphics that feel straight from the track. Across the back, PRO Racing League sits above a high-impact car graphic, executed in two-tone puff print for a textured, elevated finish. Designed for speed lovers and street racers at heart, it’s a statement piece that merges performance aesthetics with everyday wearability.

Title: Seventh Quarter
Description: Made from textured cotton for an authentic old-school feel, this jersey blends vintage sport aesthetics with street presence. The front reads Groove alongside the number 07 — a number for the ones who move differently, stay original, and lead without needing the spotlight. A small High Tribe emblem sits between chest and shoulder, a subtle nod to belonging to a higher circle. On the back, Top Dawg crowns the design, with an oversized 07 making sure the message is seen from every angle. It’s more than a jersey — it’s a uniform for those who know their place at the top.

Title: Reflection Tee
Description: A story in black and white. The front whispers Monochrome World with the faint blur of shades of thoughts beneath it — halftone text mirroring the way our memories fade at the edges. On the back, a ghostlike figure stands blurred, marked by the words a reflection of me, cracked and cold on a stitched patch. Printed entirely in black on a crisp white base, the tee feels like wearing a moment of clarity wrapped in a haze of uncertainty.

Title: Rhythm of Fear Denim
Description: An angelic figure with wings blows a trumpet,  calling you to dance on the rhythm of fear.  This design fuses divine imagery with a bold presence — a visual reminder that even fear has a beat worth moving to.  Crafted from heavy 14 oz cotton denim , known for its durability and structure, with detailed puff and screen printing for a textured, standout finish.

Description:
One side reaches for the sun. The other turns to flame. 
 This  Sunflower is a reflection. Of everything you’ve been, everything you’re still becoming. 
 A sunflower in bloom climbs one leg — bright, hopeful, alive. The other? Scorched. Burnt. Cracked by fire. 
 This piece doesn't choose sides — it appreciates both. The beauty and the burn. 
 For those who wear their past with pride. For those still evolving, still becoming. 
 🔥 “We are the universe — blooming, burning, and becoming.”

Title: The Bloomstate Hoodie
Description: The Vision A floral study in structural streetwear. The Bloomstate Hoodie juxtaposes heavy-duty construction with organic, vibrant graphics, creating a piece that feels both grounded and expressive. It is an elevated essential designed to anchor the modern street wardrobe. Design Notes Crafted in a rich earth-brown hue, this hoodie serves as a canvas for high-dimension artistry. The sleeves are fully saturated with a vivid floral wrap, utilizing high-density screen printing for sharp detail. The center chest and back features a massive, multi-textured sunflower graphic, combining flat screen-print bases with elevated puff-print accents to create a tactile, 3D experience. Finished with our signature oversized hood and a cropped, wide-body fit for the perfect drape.

Title: The darkwave hoodie
Description:
Darkwave Hoodie 
 A statement hoodie defined by contrast and attitude. Cut in an oversized silhouette, Darkwave balances relaxed proportions with deliberate structure. The black base is offset by exposed stitch detailing, creating sharp lines across the form. 
 Graphic typography across the chest anchors the piece, while layered text elements add depth without excess. Designed to move between street and downtime with ease, it delivers presence through restraint rather than volume. 
 Clean. Graphic. Considered. An essential layer with edge, built for everyday wear.

Title: The Viofuel Varsity
Description: The Vision A radical reinterpretation of the classic collegiate silhouette, the Viofuel Varsity merges heritage sports aesthetic with raw, mechanical subculture. It is a statement of velocity and intent, engineered for an aggressive, oversized fit that commands the space. Design Notes The Viofuel is defined by its striking contrast, featuring a deep ultra-violet body paired with sulfur-yellow sleeves. The garment is heavily adorned with high-density 'Bike Week' and 'Two Wheels One Soul' iconography, utilizing a mix of patch work with screen-printing for a multi-textured finish. The oversized turn-down collar and tonal popper fastenings elevate the piece from a standard jacket to a luxury outerwear staple.
